name: Duo Synth
explanation: A duophonic analog lead synthesizer. Two sawtooth oscillators independently track the two most recent held notes (lowest note -> OSC 1, newest -> OSC 2), so two keys sound as two distinct pitches; a single key locks both oscillators together. An optional hard-sync resets OSC 2 to OSC 1 for a buzzy, formant-rich tone, and the pair feeds a shared resonant 4-pole low-pass swept by one ADSR for a sharp, punchy character. Controls: Detune, Sync, Cutoff, Resonance, Env Amount, Attack, Release and Level.
